details.title: IAP-secured Egressor
details.description: Egress to resources via Identity-Aware Proxy

details.title: MCP Admin
details.description: Full access for interacting with Google-managed MCP servers.

details.title: MCP Tool User
details.description: Gives permission to call tools on any MCP server enabled by the parent project.

details.title: Transport Admin
details.description: Enables full access to Transport resources

details.title: Transport Viewer
details.description: Enables view access to Transport resources

details.title: Cloud Network Insights Admin
details.description: Full access to Cloud Network Insights resources.

details.title: Cloud Network Insights Editor
details.description: Editor access to Cloud Network Insights resources.

details.title: Cloud Network Insights Viewer
details.description: Read-only access to Cloud Network Insights resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google Cloud GoldenGate Connection Admin
details.description: Grants full access to manage all GoldenGate Connection resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google Cloud GoldenGate Connection Assignment Admin
details.description: Grants full access to manage all GoldenGate Connection Assignment resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google Cloud GoldenGate Connection Assignment Viewer
details.description: Grants read access to see all GoldenGate Connection Assignment resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google Cloud GoldenGate Connection Viewer
details.description: Grants read access to see all GoldenGate Connection resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google GoldenGate Connections User
details.description: Grants use access to GoldenGate Connections resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google Cloud GoldenGate Deployment Admin
details.description: Grants full access to manage all GoldenGate Deployment resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google Cloud GoldenGate Deployment Viewer
details.description: Grants read access to see all GoldenGate Deployment resources.

details.title: Oracle Database@Google GoldenGate Deployments User
details.description: Grants use access to GoldenGate Deployments resources.

details.title: Secure Source Manager Developer Connect Linker
details.description: A Developer Connect Linker can link a Secure Source Manager instance to Developer Connect.

details.title: Cloud Spanner Database Graph Intelligence features user
Storage Annotation Generator Service
details.description: Grants all permissions needed to generate annotations for objects in a bucket.

details.title: Storage Batch Operations Admin
details.description: Full access to Storage Batch Operations resources.

details.title: Storage Batch Operations Viewer
details.description: Readonly access to Storage Batch Operations resources.

details.title: Consumer Admin
details.description: Grants permission management access to consumer resources.

details.title: GTI Alert Admin
details.description: This role can view and edit all properties of resources.

details.title: GTI Alert User
details.description: This role can view and edit properties of resources, except for editing configurations and exporting alerts.

details.title: CTEM Admin
details.description: This role can view and edit all properties of resources along with the Projects.

details.title: CTEM Editor
details.description: This role can view and edit all properties of resources.

details.title: CTEM Viewer
details.description: This role can view all resources.

details.title: Cloud BeyondCorp Partner Service Delegate Admin
